name: GroupList
description: List Weibo follow groups with group IDs

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const resp = await fetch('https://weibo.com/ajax/feed/allGroups'); const data = await resp.json(); const groups = []; if (data.groups) { for (const category of data.groups) { if (category.group) { for (const g of category.group) { if (g.title && g.gid) { groups.push({ name: g.title, id: g.gid, type: g.type || '' }); } } } } } return groups; }
